overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from a covered commercial walkway with large digital billboards through a bright sunlit plaza and into a shaded pedestrian path beneath an overpass. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with neon advertisements, palm trees, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: ambient light increases as the character approaches the exit opening

agents.ego_description: character in light blue jacket walking steadily through the covered arcade toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and teal pants walking left across the frame

entered.detail: tall vertical digital display showing '3 Mouths 1 Desire' advertisement with red and purple graphics
large overhead digital screen displaying food advertisement with 'Sweet & Salty Sensation' text
potted palm tree in large planter near seating area
modern concrete bench with people sitting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial walkway lined with large glowing digital billboards advertising various products. The environment is dimly lit with artificial neon lighting, featuring palm trees in planters and concrete benches. Pedestrians walk in the same direction toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban plaza with elevated highway overpass

events.description: character exits the covered building into bright sunlight, transitioning from artificial to natural lighting
character turns right to walk toward the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: character steps out of the building into bright sunlight, then turns right toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the overpass

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the background against the bright sky
multi-level highway overpass with yellow structural elements and vehicles visible on upper deck
dark modern building with vertical digital signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright sunlit plaza, causing a dramatic lighting change from dark neon interior to harsh natural sunlight. Futuristic skyscrapers tower in the background while an elevated highway overpass dominates the middle ground. The character turns right and walks across the concrete plaza toward the shadow of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

events.description: character enters the shadow of the overpass, significantly reducing light levels

agents.ego_description: character walks into the shaded area beneath the overpass, continuing forward along the pedestrian path

notable_agents.action: man in brown shirt walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: concrete and steel underside of the highway overpass creating a roof over the walkway
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
strip of green grass and small plants between walkway and support pillars
large digital advertisement showing 'Set Sail' with tropical imagery

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, enclosed pedestrian walkway beneath the highway overpass. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadow and artificial lights from nearby signs. Concrete support pillars line the right side with patches of grass growing between them. Trash and debris are scattered across the tiled ground. A digital billboard advertising a tropical destination is visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined covered walkway with curved overpass structure

events.description: walkway becomes more green with dense trees and vegetation visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: character continues walking under the overpass, approaching a tunnel-like section with greenery

entered.detail: mature trees with dense green canopies growing in planters along the walkway
vertical neon light strips illuminating the pathway
arched tunnel entrance with warm lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The covered walkway continues with the overpass structure curving overhead. Large trees with lush green foliage line the left side, creating a contrast between the concrete infrastructure and nature. Neon pathway lights illuminate the route ahead toward a tunnel entrance. The environment feels like a transition zone between the commercial district and another area of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit commercial corridor into a blindingly bright plaza before descending into the shaded underbelly of a highway overpass. It begins within a covered walkway lined with glowing digital billboards and neon lights, moving alongside other pedestrians toward a distant, bright exit. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the lighting shifts dramatically to harsh natural sunlight, revealing towering futuristic skyscrapers and a wide concrete plaza. The scene then transitions into shadow as the camera follows the character beneath the massive concrete structure of an elevated highway, where the environment becomes grittier with scattered debris and support pillars. Finally, the path curves through a mix of lush green foliage and neon pathway lights, leading toward a tunnel entrance that marks the boundary of the commercial district.
